summary: Frontend-only React/TypeScript migration of Donisi plumbing site tested. All sections render correctly, animations work, no console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: works.ts only includes 6 images (work-06.webp is missing from the list) - verify if intentional
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static frontend only. All 8 tested features pass: fixed navbar, hero with red-S title and plumber image, 3 steps dynamically from steps.ts, stats counters animated via IntersectionObserver (transforms confirmed applied after scroll), works gallery 3 columns with 6 images, CSS original maintained (Science Gothic font, colors), responsive on 375px mobile viewport, zero console errors.
